hero.title: Explore the Magic of Morocco
hero.description: Unveil the Timeless Secrets of the Modern Oasis

marrakech.title: Marrakech
marrakech.description: Discover the charm of Marrakech, the Red City, where rich history meets vibrant modern life. Enjoy its traditional souks, lush gardens, and flavorful cuisine.

casablanca.title: Casablanca
casablanca.description: Discover Casablanca, the coastal city where contemporary elegance meets a rich history. Enjoy its beaches, cultural landmarks, and diverse cuisine.

chefchaouen.title: Chefchaouen
chefchaouen.description: Discover Chefchaouen, the Blue City, where natural beauty blends with cultural heritage. Wander its narrow streets, take in stunning views, and savor its unique cuisine.

journey.title: Plan Your Journey
journey.subtitle: From dream to destination in four simple steps. We handle the details so you can focus on the adventure.

discover.label: Discover
discover.title: Choose Your City
discover.description: Browse our curated collection of iconic Moroccan destinations — from the red walls of Marrakech to the blue streets of Chefchaouen.

stay.label: Stay
stay.title: Pick Your Stay
stay.description: Select from handpicked riads, boutique hotels, and luxury desert camps tailored to your style and budget.

dine.label: Dine
dine.title: Reserve a Table
dine.description: Explore Morocco's finest dining — from rooftop terraces to hidden medina gems — and book your table instantly.

explore.label: Explore
explore.title: Live the Experience
explore.description: Your itinerary is set. Immerse yourself in the culture, flavors, and timeless beauty of Morocco.

subscribe.title: Your Moroccan Story Begins Here
subscribe.description: Subscribe to receive curated travel guides, exclusive culinary experiences, and the latest hidden gems delivered straight to your inbox.
